MOTION TO COMPEL ADMISSIONS OF FACT AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Lorna Walker, Esq., for TNT Freight Management, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Michael Heath, Esq., for Furniture Ideas, Inc.'s Defendant/Opposing Party

Hearing held: Plaintiff's motion for order deeming facts and documents admitted is moot. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $560.00 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Lorna Walker, Esq., for TNT Freight Management, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Michael Heath, Esq., for Furniture Ideas, Inc.'s Defendant/Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff TNT Freight Management's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $365, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has not been considered. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ADMISSIONS OF FACT AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS
